short_description_zh: 波士頓現場生技封面故事，商周線上讀頁面列出〈抗癌大未來〉及相關系列文章，作者包含蔡靚萱。
short_description_en: A Business Weekly biotech cover package from Boston. The Business Weekly archive lists Anita Tsai as writer for the package and related articles.
source_note: Verified via Business Weekly issue archive, issue 1493, published 2016-06-23.

title_zh: 每年夏天台灣生技熱 你該懂的投資眉角

short_description_zh: 商周線上讀文章頁確認撰文者為蔡靚萱、馬自明，出刊日期為 2018-07-19。
